prompt_raw: social preview card for the iksnae/skills repository: the text "iksnae/skills" in monospace as the focal point on near-black, thin #FFCC00 underline rule, small scattered skill-name tags in dim gray.
prompt_final:
Dark CRT terminal aesthetic on near-black `#0a0a0a`. Flat color only: surfaces
`#161616`, hairline strokes `#2a2a2a`, text `#e8e8e8`, single yellow accent
`#FFCC00` used sparingly. Monospace labels, terse. Diagrams and technical
compositions only — no characters, scenes, or illustrations. No gradients, no
shadows, no glow, no rounded corners, no neon or synthwave. Quiet terminal
aesthetic.

social preview card for the iksnae/skills repository: the text "iksnae/skills" in monospace as the focal point on near-black, thin #FFCC00 underline rule, small scattered skill-name tags in dim gray.
